caption: A man in a brown shirt and light-colored shawl speaks into a microphone labeled "ANI" while standing outdoors. He is flanked by other people, and the background consists of greenery and distant structures. The news broadcast features several overlays, including the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo and various headshots of political figures such as "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी." Prominent red banners at the bottom of the screen display the text "नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठबंधन में भ्रष्टाचारी जुटे" and the time "10:06 PM." The top banner in the initial frames says "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है," which later changes to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी" alongside a photo of "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार." Across the sequence, the man continues speaking with a steady expression, while the surrounding on-screen graphics and headlines update to present different political context.
